rationale: seat RMSD 4.7Å ~ native 4.5; intra-dimer R146 5.5-6.3Å ~ native apo-ring 6.6; ring closes with two WT neighbors. Ring context rescued what the isolated 2-mer could not (cycle-2: 8-22Å, stochastic).
phase3_branch: B1 reforms interfaces -> ESCALATE (ensemble on native ring + best B1 variants; if budget, add dead-subunit E119Q dimer).
